itemName.zh: Aklys Defense 迅猛龙 .300 Blackout 突击步枪
itemName.en: Aklys Defense Velociraptor .300 Blackout assault rifle

itemName.zh: CQC 鱼鹰 MK4A 防弹胸挂（防护型，多地形迷彩）
itemName.en: CQC Osprey MK4A plate carrier (Protection, MTP)

itemName.zh: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 栓动狙击步枪
itemName.en: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM bolt-action sniper rifle

description.zh:
又见面了！我看了一下你之前藏起来的那份运输报告。

看起来是我们那些USEC的“好兄弟”参与其中……好像咱们的问题还不够多似的。但我大概知道怎么处理他们。那帮Rogue游荡者的头儿们经常出现在塔科夫各地，尤其是在新建的烂尾楼那儿附近，那地方距离TerraGroup集团的货物也不远。

我建议你找几个不错的狙击点位，不过要不要用这招还是看你自己。要是能找个好位置解决他们，风险会小很多你也懂的。记住，务必要用狙击类武器对付他们，信我，子弹也别省，那帮家伙的护甲不是摆设。

最好一口气把这仨都干掉，有能力吗？搞完之后赶紧撤，别忘了那一片撤离点不少，趁乱溜就对了。
description.en:
Hello again! I took a look at the shipment report that you stashed.

Seems like our USEC friends are involved... As if we didn't have enough problems already, but I know how we could take care of it. The rogue leaders roam around most of Tarkov, they get spotted pretty frequently near the scav base, which is not too far from the Terragroup shipments.

I suggest you look for some decent sniping spots, but that is entirely up to you, less risk when you take them out from a good position, you know. But you should absolutely use some form of sniper rifle to get rid of these guys, trust me, and bring some good ammo, their armor is not a joke.

Also it would be wise to take out all three of them at once, can you do that? And get the hell out there once you're done, don't forget that there are a ton of exfils around that place.
